headline: AMCR Q3 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Beat on Berry Acquisition
summary: Amcor's Q3 sales surge 77% y/y on the Berry deal, beating estimates as margins improve, but softer demand and lower FY26 outlook temper the momentum.

headline: AptarGroup Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates but Decline Y/Y, Shares Dip 1%
summary: ATR tops Q1 earnings estimates on strong sales growth, but profit declines, pharma headwinds and margin pressure send shares down despite an upbeat Q2 outlook.
